taxonomy: Carelia conyzoides is classified as a species of plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This family is commonly known as the carnation or pink family. Carelia conyzoides is further categorized under the genus Carelia, which is a genus of flowering plants. The plant's classification also includes being a member of the order Caryophyllales, a group of flowering plants. Carelia conyzoides is also classified as a dicotyledonous plant, meaning it has two cotyledons or seed leaves in its seedling stage.
